title: stelis garayi
intro: Stelis garayi, also known as the Garay's Stelis, is a type of orchid native to Central America. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting the body against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Stelis garayi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
